source.description: Where to get the test dataset from

dataTable.description: Load the test dataset from a local Data table

googleSheets.description: Load the test dataset from a Google Sheets document

setInputsNotice.displayName: For adding columns from your dataset to the evaluation results. Anything you add here will be displayed in the ‘evaluations’ tab, not on the Google Sheet or Data table.

notice.displayName: Routes to the ‘evaluation’ branch if the execution started from an evaluation trigger. Otherwise routes to the ‘normal’ branch.

correctness.description: Whether the answer’s meaning is consistent with a reference answer. Uses a scale of 1 (worst) to 5 (best).

helpfulness.description: Whether the response addresses the query. Uses a scale of 1 (worst) to 5 (best).

stringSimilarity.description: How close the answer is to a reference answer, measured character-by-character (edit distance). Returns a score between 0 and 1.

categorization.description: Whether the answer exactly matches the reference answer. Returns 1 if so and 0 otherwise.

toolsUsed.description: Whether tool(s) were used or not. Returns a score between 0 and 1.

expectedAnswer.description: The expected output defined in your evaluation dataset, used as ground truth

actualAnswer.description: The response generated by AI (e.g. an agent or LLM in the workflow)

userQuery.description: The original input or question submitted by the user

expectedTools.description: Enter the name(s) of the tool(s) you expect the AI to call (separated by commas)
expectedTools.placeholder: Get Events, Send Email, Search Database

prompt.description: Instruction used to guide the model in scoring the actual answer’s helpfulness against the expected answer

metricName.description: Set this parameter if you want to set a custom name to the metric
